OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation is present. Represented by
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Olaniyan Adams is present.
Attorney Teresa Lynn Friend representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Gutierrez, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.

To Vacate Default And Default Judgmnt
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. TERESA FRIEND, TEL. NO. 865-9203 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.
